payload.notes: User approved the snapshot plus automatic typed changeset design and authorized E15 execution on 2026-07-20.
payload.predicted_impact: Fresh clones and source worktrees reconstruct one authoritative core state without tracking the writable database or adding per-task lifecycle commands.
payload.title: Reproducible Core State

payload.notes: First E15 implementation story; preserve consumer opt-in behavior and add no lifecycle commands.
payload.title: Automatic Source Changeset Capture
payload.verify_command: cargo test -p harness-cli automatic_source_changeset && cargo test -p harness-cli failed_logged_write_rolls_back_without_changeset && tests/docs/test-doc-contracts.sh && git diff --check

payload.evidence: Focused auto-capture and rollback tests passed; CLI-level source, isolated DB, and consumer fixtures passed against workspace and repository-local binaries; all 94 workspace tests, Clippy -D warnings, documentation contracts, installer modes, and git diff check passed. Windows-hosted platform proof remains for the release matrix.

payload.actions_taken: ["Recorded ADR 0011 and the high-risk story packet","added source/default-database detection","generated one portable unique run ID per CLI process","added repository and CLI-level positive and negative fixtures","updated source and installer contracts","ran workspace lint test docs and installer validation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["Automatic capture applies only to the default database in an actual Harness CLI source checkout","caller-supplied HARNESS_RUN_ID remains authoritative","each CLI process receives one time-sortable collision-resistant run ID","installed consumers and isolated HARNESS_DB_PATH workflows remain opt-in","ADR 0011 enters the reusable installer payload because it defines consumer behavior"]
payload.errors: ["The first in-progress CAS omitted --json and was rejected then corrected","the first CLI fixture exercised a stale standalone binary so the fixture now builds the executable it tests","the initial decision index linked source-only decisions absent from the installer and was narrowed to the reusable payload"]
payload.harness_friction: Mandatory bootstrap continues to stop at existing backlog #19 because the live core database contains Symphony-owned state; bootstrap still rebuilt and installed the current CLI, and the new fixture proved that binary independently.
payload.notes: Detailed trace for the high-risk data ownership, existing behavior, public contract, and cross-platform flags. Duration and token estimate cover the active-goal execution through US-115. Windows-hosted proof is deferred to the existing release matrix; portable filename behavior and consumer isolation are covered by Rust tests that run cross-platform.
payload.task_summary: Implemented automatic semantic changeset capture for default Harness source-state mutations while preserving consumer and isolated-database behavior.
